title: How do I personalize teaching and learning in Canvas?
plain_text: The Canvas Learning Management System provides many tools to personalize content delivery and create student voice and choice opportunities within the learning environment. Shifting to a student-centered approach means rethinking the role of the learner, from being a receiver of learning to an active participant. For a quick start, refer to, What is Canvas Learning Management System? for more information. Communicating with students is an essential practice in effective teaching. Reduce student confusion and cognitive overload by developing a structured communication strategy when setting up your course. Set clear expectations about communication at the start of the semester. Be consistent in the timing (days/time) and delivery medium of major course communications. Read below to learn more about the options to help you personalize teaching and learning in Canvas. Table of Contents: Add your profile picture, Set your notification preferences, Opt-out of Canvas Conversations (Inbox), Set your display name, time zone, personal pronouns, and language, Customize your course dashboard, Additional options for customizing your experience. Add your profile picture: The Canvas profile settings allow faculty and students to personalize the Canvas experience for themselves and increase connection and engagement with each other. You can set a profile picture to display throughout Canvas. Select the Account icon on the global navigation menu. Select Profile. Navigate to the person's image and select the pencil icon to edit the profile picture. Select 'Upload a Picture'. Select the picture image to open your computer file manager. Select Save. Set your notification preferences: Canvas includes a set of default notification preferences you can receive for your courses. However, you can change the default settings by setting your notification preferences. Notify me right away, Daily Summary, Weekly summary, Don't send. Select the Account icon on the global navigation menu. Select Notifications. For each type of course event notification, choose whether you would like a notification to be sent immediately, within a daily summary, or weekly summary. Opt-out of Canvas Conversations (Inbox): Opting out redirects the messages sent within Canvas to your preferred external email. Go to Account, and then select Settings. In Account Settings, select the box for 'Conversations Inbox Opt-out'. Set your display name, time zone, personal pronouns, and language: Select Account, Select Settings, Select 'Edit Settings'. Update your settings (Display Name, Pronouns, Language, Time Zone). Select 'Update Settings'. Customize your course Dashboard: The Dashboard is the first thing you will see when you log into Canvas. Select the Dashboard icon. Select anywhere on the course card to enter the course. Select the vertical ellipses to change aspects of this card. Drag cards to change the order. Additional options to customize your experience: Subscribe to Canvas Calendars, log in to Canvas on a mobile device, record name pronunciation in Namecoach.
